Public Remarks: Cozy 2 bed 2 bath condo steps from Blind Pass Beach. Fully updated kitchen. Community pool. Water views of the Intracoastal Waterway. Walk to restaurants and shops on Gulf Blvd. One small pet allowed. Available August 2026.
